---
id: get-sim-using-get
title: "Get Single SIM"
description: "Get detail information (status, label, MSISDN, IMSI, ICCID, Lifetime, etc.) for a singe SIM based on the ICCID."
sidebar_label: "Get Single SIM"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/sim-management/sim-management
custom_edit_url: null
---

  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Single SIM"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/sims/{iccid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get detail information (status, label, MSISDN, IMSI, ICCID, Lifetime, etc.) for a singe SIM based on the ICCID.
